_warning: Feature definitions are IMMUTABLE. Only 'passes', 'status', 'subtasks[].status', 'verifiedAt', and 'commit' fields may be modified. IT IS CATASTROPHIC TO REMOVE OR EDIT FEATURE DEFINITIONS.

features.name: Google OAuth Login
features.description: Sign in with Gmail account to access Google Drive and Sheets
acceptanceCriteria: User can sign in with their Google account
OAuth scopes include drive.file, spreadsheets, and userinfo.email
Session persists across page refreshes
User can sign out

subtasks.name: Initialise Next.js project with TypeScript + Tailwind
Set up Google Cloud Console project and write README setup guide
Integrate NextAuth.js with Google provider and OAuth scopes
Build login page and auth-protected layout
Test OAuth flow end-to-end

features.name: Receipt Upload
features.description: Web form to upload JPG or PDF receipt files from any device
acceptanceCriteria: Upload form accepts JPG/JPEG files
Upload form accepts PDF files
Form is mobile-responsive and works on iPhone Safari/Chrome
Upload rejects unsupported file types with clear error message
One receipt uploaded at a time

subtasks.name: Build upload page with drag-and-drop and file picker
Create POST /api/upload route to receive and validate files

features.name: OCR & Data Extraction
features.description: Extract text from receipt using Tesseract and parse into structured fields
acceptanceCriteria: Extracts text from JPG images using Tesseract
Extracts text from PDF files
Parses patient name from extracted text
Fuzzy matches patient name to known family members (full or first name)
Extracts invoice amount in EUR
Extracts invoice date
Identifies practitioner type (GP, dentist, physio, etc.)
Identifies treatment description
Classifies expense as Med 1 or Med 2
Flags low-confidence fields for manual review

subtasks.name: Integrate Tesseract.js for JPG OCR on server side
Add PDF text extraction (pdf-parse v1.1.1)
Build field parser for date, amount, name, practitioner, treatment
Implement fuzzy name matching against family members
Build Med 1 / Med 2 classifier
Implement confidence scoring for extracted fields

knownIssues: Tesseract.js requires explicit workerPath set to process.cwd() + node_modules path — see ocr.ts
pdf-parse must be required as 'pdf-parse/lib/pdf-parse.js' to avoid self-test ENOENT bug
pdf-parse pinned to v1.1.1 — v2 uses pdfjs-dist v4 which crashes with DOMMatrix error in Next.js

features.name: Review & Confirmation Screen
features.description: Display extracted data in editable form for user to review and confirm
acceptanceCriteria: All extracted fields displayed in editable form
Low-confidence fields visually highlighted
Family member selectable from dropdown of 5 known members
Med 1 / Med 2 category selectable
Reimbursement section: checkbox, insurer name, reimbursed amount
Confirm button saves the expense
Cancel button discards without saving

subtasks.name: Build review form with editable pre-populated fields
Add low-confidence field highlighting
Add dropdowns, selectors, and reimbursement section
Add receipt image/PDF preview alongside form

features.name: Google Drive Storage
features.description: Save receipt file to Google Drive with structured naming convention
acceptanceCriteria: Receipt saved to Medical/[year]/expenses/ folder in Google Drive
File renamed to YYYY-MM-DD_[FamilyMember]_[PractitionerType]_EURAmount.ext
Year folder auto-created if it does not exist
Expenses subfolder auto-created if it does not exist
Original file format preserved (JPG stays JPG, PDF stays PDF)

subtasks.name: Create Drive service: find-or-create folder by path
Implement file upload with naming convention and shareable link
Handle multi-year folder creation from expense date

features.name: Google Spreadsheet Logging
features.description: Write expense details as a row in Google Sheets with receipt link
acceptanceCriteria: Row written with all required columns: Date, Family Member, Practitioner Type, Treatment Description, Amount, Med 1/Med 2, Reimbursed, Insurer Name, Reimbursed Amount, Net Claimable Amount, Receipt Link, Upload Date
Receipt Link is a clickable Google Drive URL
Net Claimable Amount calculated as Amount minus Reimbursed Amount
Row written to correct year tab
New year tab auto-created when year changes
Spreadsheet auto-created on first use if it does not exist

subtasks.name: Create Sheets service: find-or-create spreadsheet and year tab with headers
Implement append row with all columns and Net Claimable calculation
Handle multi-year tab creation from expense date
Create POST /api/expenses route orchestrating Drive + Sheets

features.name: Multi-Year Support
features.description: Automatically manage year-based folder structure and spreadsheet tabs
acceptanceCriteria: Expense year detected from invoice date, not upload date
Google Drive folder created for new year automatically
Google Sheet tab created for new year automatically
Historical receipts (e.g. 2026 receipt uploaded in 2027) filed correctly
features._note: Multi-year logic is built into F005 and F006 — year derived from expense date field

features.name: Cloud Run Deployment
features.description: Deploy app to Google Cloud Run via GitHub Actions CI/CD
acceptanceCriteria: App accessible at a public Cloud Run URL
Google OAuth redirect URI updated in Cloud Console for production URL
All environment variables set as Cloud Run secrets
Push to main branch triggers automatic redeploy via GitHub Actions
OCR works correctly in container (Tesseract language data downloads at runtime)

subtasks.name: Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build (standalone Next.js output)
Create .dockerignore
Enable output: standalone in next.config.ts
Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml
Push code to GitHub repository
Create GCP service account 'github-actions' with run.admin + artifactregistry.writer + iam.serviceAccountUser roles
Export service account key JSON and add as GCP_SA_KEY secret in GitHub
Add all app secrets to GitHub (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_URL, GOOGLE_SPREADSHEET_ID, GCP_PROJECT_ID)
Enable Cloud Run and Artifact Registry APIs: gcloud services enable run.googleapis.com artifactregistry.googleapis.com
Create Artifact Registry repo: gcloud artifacts repositories create medexpense --repository-format=docker --location=europe-west1
Push to main to trigger first deployment
Add Cloud Run production URL to OAuth authorised redirect URIs
Update NEXTAUTH_URL secret in GitHub to production Cloud Run URL and redeploy
Smoke test: upload a receipt on production URL

commands.createServiceAccount: gcloud iam service-accounts create github-actions --display-name='GitHub Actions deployer'
commands.exportKey: gcloud iam service-accounts keys create gha-key.json --iam-account=github-actions@PROJECT_ID.iam.gserviceaccount.com

features.name: Tax Summary View
features.description: Per-year summary with Med 1/Med 2 totals and family member breakdown
acceptanceCriteria: Shows total expenses per year
Breakdown by Med 1 and Med 2 categories
Breakdown by family member
Shows total reimbursed vs net claimable amounts
Figures directly usable for Med 1 / Med 2 tax return forms

subtasks.name: Tax summary page: aggregate totals by category and family member
Format summary for Med 1 / Med 2 tax return sections

features.name: Expense List View
features.description: Table view of all logged expenses with filtering
acceptanceCriteria: All expenses displayed in a sortable table
Filter by year
Filter by family member
Filter by Med 1 / Med 2 category
Clickable link to receipt in Google Drive

subtasks.name: GET /api/expenses route: read rows from Google Sheets API
Expense list page: display sortable table
Add filters for year, family member, category

features.name: Bulk Upload
features.description: Upload multiple receipts in one session for sequential processing
acceptanceCriteria: User can select multiple files at once
Files processed sequentially with review step for each
Progress indicator shows queue status

features.name: Edit Previously Logged Expense
features.description: Modify a previously saved expense from the web UI
acceptanceCriteria: User can select an expense from the list and edit it
Changes update the Google Spreadsheet row
Reimbursement status can be updated after initial entry

features.name: Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Year-to-date total spending displayed
Spending breakdown by category chart
Spending breakdown by family member chart
